versions.version_description: This song is in the Key of E

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab]Chords:
   [ch]C#7[/ch]     [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
e|--0-------0-------0-----|
B|--0-------0-------0-----|
G|--9-------9-------8-----|
D|--11------7-------9-----|
A|------------------------|
E|------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
I've got another confession to make,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
I'm your fool.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
Everyone's got their chains to break,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
Holdin' you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Were you born to resist[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
or be abused?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Are you gone and onto someone new?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                            
I needed somewhere to hang my head,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
Without your noose.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
You gave me something that I didn't have,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
but had no use.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
I was too weak to give in,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
Too strong to lose.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
My heart is under arrest again,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
but I break loose.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
My head is giving me life or death,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
but I can't choose.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
I swear I'll never give in.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
I refuse.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
Has someone taken your faith?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Its real, the pain you feel.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
You trust, you must, confess.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]


[Interlude]

Oh...
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
Oh...[/tab]
[ch]Esus4[/ch]
[ch]C#7[/ch]
[ch]Esus4[/ch]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Oh...Oh...Oh...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
Oh...Oh...Oh...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Oh...Oh...Oh...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
Oh...Oh...Oh...[/tab]


[Verse] 

[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
Has someone taken your faith?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Its real, the pain you feel.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
The life, the love,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
you die to heal.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
The hope that starts,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
the broken hearts.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
You trust, you must, confess.[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]


[Verse] 

[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
I've got another confession my friend.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
I'm no fool.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
I'm getting tired of starting again,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
somewhere new.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Were you born to resist [/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
or be abused?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
I swear I'll never give in.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
I refuse.[/tab]


[Chorus] 

[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
Has someone taken your faith?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Its real, the pain you feel.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]
You trust, you must, confess.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]                          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]
Oh...[/tab]
